hero.headline: Discover the potential of your property.
hero.sub: Luxury residential management in Costa Rica, refined hospitality, sustainable operations, and enduring value for property owners.

whoWeAre.lead: Zen Hospitality was born from the need for a luxury residential operator that unites refined hospitality with sustainability, positive community impact, and long-term value creation for property owners.
whoWeAre.body: We manage exceptional private residences with a thoughtful, performance-driven approach, enhancing guest experiences, supporting local communities, and maximizing the enduring value of every home we operate.
whoWeAre.bannerAlt: Open plan living room with ocean view at a Zen Reserve

values.title: Curated excellence
values.body: We thoughtfully operate spaces and offer experiences that elevate well-being while honoring the environment. Every detail is intentionally curated to deliver conscious luxury, balance, and lasting value.

values.title: Effortless hospitality
values.body: Luxury should feel seamless. We anticipate needs with quiet precision, offering attentive service that allows guests and owners to experience complete ease and peace of mind.

values.title: Trust through integrity
values.body: We build enduring relationships through transparency, accountability, and performance, aligning operational excellence with measurable returns and protecting the long-term value of every property we manage.

vision.label: Our vision
vision.text: To redefine luxury property management by creating sustainable, wellness-driven experiences that elevate guest satisfaction while delivering consistent, long-term returns for property owners, setting a new standard where conscious design, operational excellence, and financial performance coexist seamlessly.

promise.label: Our promise
promise.text: We elevate luxury stays for discerning guests while maximizing long-term value and returns for property owners, through thoughtful, sustainable management and refined hospitality.

whyCostaRica.headline: A rare balance.
paragraphs: Costa Rica offers a rare balance of effortless beauty and meaningful experiences. From sunlit Pacific beaches to lush tropical forests, the country invites guests to slow down, reconnect, and immerse themselves in nature, without sacrificing comfort or sophistication. Its warm culture, year-round climate, and easy international access make it a natural choice for travelers seeking both escape and authenticity.

This enduring appeal translates into consistent, high-quality demand for well-curated stays. As more travelers prioritize privacy, personalization, and longer stays, Costa Rica continues to stand out as a destination where exceptional guest experiences naturally align with strong and sustained performance for thoughtfully managed homes.

collection.headline: Exclusive residences
collection.lead: Three locations along the Pacific, each defined by its architecture, setting, and the rhythm of its coast.

cards.name: Zen Reserve · Guanacaste
cards.body: Papagayo, El Coco, Flamingo and Tamarindo: a stretch of Pacific coast where bays, marinas and luxury communities meet the dry tropical landscape.

cards.name: Zen Reserve · Nicoya Peninsula
cards.body: From Nosara to Santa Teresa: pristine surf beaches, wellness sanctuaries and tropical forest meeting the ocean.

cards.name: Zen Reserve · Central Pacific
cards.body: Jacó and Herradura: dramatic surf, cliffside coves and easy reach from San José for shorter stays.

services.headline: End-to-end operations
services.descriptor: Measured precision across every detail of your residence.
descriptors: Asset oversight, vendor coordination, and contract administration.
24/7 guest care from pre-arrival through departure.
Routine and deep cleaning, presentation, and laundered linens.
Preventive programs covering HVAC, pool, landscaping, structure.
Immediate response and incident resolution, day or night.
Listings, OTAs, dynamic pricing, and luxury travel partners.
Detailed performance, financial, and operational transparency.
Access control, on-site protocols, and compliance oversight.
Audits, supplier oversight, and continuous improvement plans.
Custom requests beyond the standard scope, coordinated end-to-end.

twoPaths.headline: Choose how Zen Hospitality serves your asset

tabs.label: Property Management
tabs.title: Property Management
tabs.intro: At Zen Hospitality, we manage luxury residences with a performance-driven approach that protects your assets, elevates the guest experience, and maximizes long-term value.

blocks.b: Proactive and preventive programs covering garden and landscaping, HVAC, swimming pools, structural infrastructure, and high-end furnishings, with responsible and sustainable pest control.
Luxury-level housekeeping delivered with precision and consistency, routine cleanings, deep cleanings, and specialized services tailored to each residence.
Comprehensive oversight: access control, on-site procedures, preventive measures, and strict compliance with local regulations.
Regular audits and detailed reporting to preserve property value while preventing guest complaints through inspections, performance evaluations, and corrective action plans.
Updates on property, community developments, and the operational + sustainability initiatives generating positive impact locally, supporting informed decisions and long-term value creation.

tabs.label: Vacation Rentals Program
tabs.title: Vacation Rentals Program
tabs.intro: Designed to attract discerning travelers who value well-being, sustainability, and refined experiences, while protecting each residence and delivering long-term performance for owners.

blocks.b: Direct bookings via our website and social channels, avoiding costly third-party commissions. Backed by a 24/7 contact center for exceptional guest support.
Partnership with Marriott Homes & Villas, accessing 237M+ Marriott Bonvoy members, higher average spend, longer stays, preference for exclusive properties.
Data-driven pricing strategy based on demand, booking windows, competitor pricing, and historical performance to maximize revenue.
Curated partnerships with adventure, wellness, and family-focused luxury travel agencies, attracting guests who match each residence.
Airbnb, Vrbo, Expedia, Booking.com, maintained with market managers to optimize rates and participate in international campaigns.

packages.headline: Choose your engagement
packages.descriptor: Three engagements, each calibrated to a different ambition for your residence.

cards.name: Zen Care
cards.objective: Comprehensive management of the real estate asset, protecting capital value, guaranteeing organized operations, and providing transparency for owners.

cards.name: Zen Preserve
cards.objective: Preserve the physical condition of the property, prevent major failures, and ensure optimal safety, functionality, and presentation. Includes Zen Care.

cards.name: Zen Legacy
cards.objective: Maximize asset performance through professional short-term rental management, aligned with hospitality standards and commercial optimization. Includes Zen Care or Zen Preserve.
includes: All of Zen Care or Zen Preserve
Pre-arrival, in-stay, and post-stay guest care

journey.headline: Your property journey with Zen Hospitality
journey.introBody: A structured approach designed to launch your property efficiently and maximize performance from day one.

steps.title: Strategic Alignment
steps.body: Align goals, execute the management agreement, and conduct a detailed assessment to define the optimal revenue strategy.

steps.title: Property Readiness
steps.body: Prepare the property to hospitality standards, coordinating improvements, setup, and operational readiness.

steps.title: Market Positioning
steps.body: Build a strong market presence with professional photography, compelling listing content, and pricing strategy.

steps.title: Market Launch
steps.body: Activate listings across key channels and open bookings with close monitoring from the start.

steps.title: Performance Optimization
steps.body: Continuously refine pricing and operations to maximize revenue and guest satisfaction.

cards.title: A locally rooted approach that enriches every stay
What would your guest experience look like?

locallyRooted.headline: Enriching every stay
locallyRooted.photoAlt: Golden hour over a Costa Rica Pacific cove
bullets: A thoughtfully cultivated network of local partners, each collaboration supports livelihoods, nurtures talent, and brings authenticity into every guest interaction.
A deliberate commitment to sourcing from high-quality local suppliers, ensuring every detail reflects both excellence and a true sense of place.
Integration of locally crafted products and ingredients, allowing guests to experience the destination through texture, scent, and story.
Seamless partnerships that create a living ecosystem around the property, service flows naturally and every touchpoint feels intentional.
A philosophy that values meaningful local impact, resonating with a new generation of travelers who seek depth, purpose, and genuine connection.

guestExperience.headline: What would your guest experience look like?
guestExperience.subhead: Eight quiet moments that turn a residence into a sanctuary.
bullets: A curated welcome experience that elevates perceived value, supporting stronger first impressions, better reviews, and higher nightly rates.
Seamless self check-in and check-out, reducing operational friction.
A 24/7 digital concierge that drives satisfaction and repeat bookings without increasing fixed costs.
Curated tours and experiences that deepen engagement and extend length of stay.
Optional grocery pre-stocking, increasing ancillary revenue.
High-end, organic, locally sourced amenities, and superior quality linens and towels.
24/7 security, protecting the asset and elevating overall experience.

beyondTheStay.headline: Hospitality as legacy
beyondTheStay.quote: True luxury is rooted in the positive impact we create.
beyondTheStay.closing: Together with our guests, since 2024, every stay contributes.
beyondTheStay.intro: At Zen Hospitality, we believe true luxury goes beyond beautiful spaces, it is rooted in the positive impact we create. We invite our guests to be part of the sponsors of non-profit organizations we support:

partners.name: CEPIA
partners.body: Costa Rican nationally accredited non-profit, since 2005 promoting culture, education and labor opportunities, mental and physical health, participation, and social cohesion for vulnerable children, teenagers, and families in Guanacaste.

partners.name: The Clean Wave
partners.body: Community-driven nonprofit based in Tamarindo, Guanacaste. Founded in 2017, it works to protect and restore coastal and marine ecosystems by mobilizing volunteers against pollution and environmental degradation.

partners.name: Sibu Wildlife Sanctuary
partners.body: Nonprofit wildlife rescue and rehabilitation center near Nosara on the Nicoya Peninsula, caring for injured, orphaned, displaced, or vulnerable native wildlife with medical treatment and a safe environment.

faqs.headline: Questions, answered
faqs.descriptorTemplate: {count} of the most common questions about working with Zen Hospitality.
faqs.contactBody: A Zen Hospitality advisor responds within 24 hours. Initial conversations are complimentary and confidential.

items.q: What is the expected return of the property?
items.a: Returns depend on variables such as location, property type, average daily rate (ADR), and occupancy. Zen Hospitality actively optimizes these factors through dynamic pricing and hands-on management, with the objective of maximizing annual net income.

Net income is defined as gross booking revenue minus operating costs (cleaning, maintenance, utilities), management fees, and extraordinary expenses (if applicable). A detailed monthly financial report is provided.

items.q: What is the level of risk?
items.a: The model reduces operational risk through full operational control, continuous maintenance, and diversified distribution channels. However, revenue remains subject to market conditions such as seasonality and tourism demand.

items.q: Can I project ROI before investing?
items.a: Yes. Financial projections can be developed based on assumptions around ADR, occupancy, and operating costs, including conservative, base, and optimistic scenarios.
Through structured processes including operational checklists, weekly supervision, supplier oversight, and periodic reporting.
Through a preventive maintenance program combined with 24/7 corrective support, continuous monitoring and resolution of any incidents.

items.q: What happens if a supplier underperforms?
items.a: Zen Hospitality coordinates immediate replacement and maintains strict quality control over all services delivered.
Yes. All operational and financial activities are tracked and documented through structured, recurring reports.

items.q: Can I operate my property remotely?
items.a: Yes. The model is designed for full remote operation, guest management, maintenance, daily operations, and financial administration.

items.q: How do I receive my income?
items.a: Income is distributed through periodic transfers, accompanied by clear and detailed financial reporting.

items.q: Do I need a legal structure in Costa Rica?
items.a: It depends on each case. Local tax advisory is recommended to determine the most appropriate structure.
Tax compliance is the responsibility of the property owner. Zen Hospitality provides the necessary information to facilitate this process.

items.q: Can I still use my property?
items.a: Yes, within a defined number of nights per year and subject to calendar availability.

items.q: Can I manage direct bookings or referrals?
items.a: Yes, however all bookings must be channeled through Zen Hospitality to ensure operational control, traceability, and consistency in the guest experience.

items.q: What if I require additional services?
items.a: Zen Hospitality can coordinate additional services under a cost-plus structure with a logistical fee, particularly for requests outside the standard operating radius.

items.q: What happens if I sell the property?
items.a: The contract may be transferred to the new owner. If not, termination terms as defined in the agreement will apply.

items.q: Why does Zen Legacy require Zen Preserve?
items.a: Because service quality, property reputation, and commercial performance depend directly on consistent execution in cleaning, maintenance, and operational control.

items.q: Can I work with my own suppliers?
items.a: Not within Zen Legacy. The model requires full operational control to guarantee standards and results.

items.q: How is Zen Hospitality different from a traditional property manager?
items.a: Zen Hospitality integrates operations, maintenance, and commercialization under a structured model focused on standardization, control, and performance, treating the property as an investment asset, not just a home.
